summary: Staged Proceeds Application feature fully tested. All 28 API tests pass. The service correctly implements staged application controls with filtering by asset, date range, valuation status, and confidence threshold. Validation delta metrics work correctly showing orphan_disposals, validation_status, and can_export before/after. Rollback functionality verified - successfully rolled back and re-applied a batch of 15 records.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data with previously applied staged batches
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staged Proceeds Application feature fully implemented and tested. All 121 candidates have been applied in staged batches. Current rollback batches: afda56e3 (15 records, $21,123.23), 9b4bd296 (86 records, $33,197.44), 74eda72d (20 records, $18,478.71). Validation shows can_export=true, validation_status=valid, orphan_disposals=0.

api_endpoints.GET /api/custody/proceeds/staged/stages: PASS - Returns recommended application stages with total_candidates, stages array, blocked_by_safety
api_endpoints.GET /api/custody/proceeds/staged/preview: PASS - Preview with filtering by asset, date range, valuation status, confidence threshold
api_endpoints.POST /api/custody/proceeds/staged/apply: PASS - Apply with filters, returns validation delta showing orphan_disposals, validation_status, can_export before/after
api_endpoints.GET /api/custody/proceeds/rollback-batch: PASS - Lists all rollback batches with batch_id, record_count, total_value, created_at, assets
api_endpoints.POST /api/custody/proceeds/rollback: PASS - Rollback a batch by batch_id, returns deleted_count and deleted_tx_ids
